_comment: Each key must exactly match a meal name in meals.json. 'ingredients' is a list of strings. 'instructions' is a short method. 'vegetarian' is true or false and controls the green asterisk marker shown next to the meal name around the site.

Spaghetti Bolognese.instructions: Brown the mince, soften the onion, carrot and garlic, add tomatoes, puree, stock and seasoning. Simmer 20 mins. Serve over cooked spaghetti with parmesan.

Chicken Curry.instructions: Fry onion, garlic and ginger, add curry powder, then chicken. Pour in coconut milk and simmer 15 mins. Serve with rice and coriander.

Veggie Stir Fry.instructions: Fry tofu until golden, set aside. Stir fry vegetables, add tofu, soy sauce and sesame oil. Toss with cooked noodles and sesame seeds.

Beef Tacos.instructions: Brown mince with taco seasoning and a splash of water. Fill taco shells with mince, lettuce, tomato, cheese and sour cream.

Salmon & Roast Veg.instructions: Toss vegetables in oil, roast 20 mins at 200C. Add salmon for the final 12 mins. Squeeze lemon over before serving.

Mushroom Risotto.instructions: Soften onion and mushrooms, add rice and wine, then add stock gradually, stirring, until creamy. Stir through butter and parmesan.

Lentil Soup.instructions: Saute onion, carrot and celery, add lentils, cumin, tomatoes and stock. Simmer 25 mins until lentils are soft, then blend if desired.

Chicken Caesar Salad.instructions: Grill or pan-fry chicken until cooked, slice. Toss lettuce with dressing, top with chicken, parmesan and croutons.

Sausage & Mash.instructions: Grill sausages until browned. Boil and mash potatoes with butter and milk. Fry onions and stir through gravy. Serve together.

Margherita Pizza.instructions: Spread passata over the base, tear over mozzarella, drizzle with oil and bake at 220C for 10-12 mins. Top with fresh basil.
